questions.question: What are the main differences between regular pipes and FIFOs?
expectedPoints: Regular pipes are unnamed and temporary
FIFOs have names in the filesystem and persist
Regular pipes only work with related processes
FIFOs can be used by unrelated processes

questions.question: Explain with a code example how to create a pipe and use it for communication between a parent and child process.
expectedPoints: Use pipe() system call to create the pipe
Fork a child process after creating the pipe
Close appropriate ends in parent and child
Parent writes to pipe, child reads from pipe
Handle potential errors in system calls
